known_bloatware.name: CleanMyMac X
known_bloatware.reason: Unnecessary antivirus on Mac — the moonlock service uses substantial RAM and CPU with no real benefit

known_bloatware.name: Logitech Options+
known_bloatware.reason: The updater has a known bug that pins it at 70% CPU indefinitely (sometimes for months)

known_bloatware.name: Adobe Creative Cloud
known_bloatware.reason: Installs 15+ background processes even when no Adobe app is open — uses GBs of RAM

known_bloatware.name: Boom 3D / Boom Audio
known_bloatware.reason: Installs kernel-level audio drivers that can cause crashes and high CPU

known_bloatware.name: McAfee Total Protection
known_bloatware.reason: Antivirus not needed on macOS — significantly slows the system

known_bloatware.name: Norton Security
known_bloatware.reason: Antivirus not needed on macOS — consumes lots of resources

known_bloatware.name: Avast Security
known_bloatware.reason: Antivirus not needed on macOS — often causes slowdowns

known_bloatware.name: AVG AntiVirus
known_bloatware.reason: Antivirus not needed on macOS

known_bloatware.name: Kaspersky
known_bloatware.reason: Antivirus not needed on macOS — very invasive

known_bloatware.name: Citrix Workspace
known_bloatware.reason: Leaves residual processes running even when not in use

known_bloatware.name: Wacom Driver
known_bloatware.reason: Driver often hits high CPU even with no tablet connected

known_bloatware.name: Spotify
known_bloatware.reason: Helper processes can use a lot of RAM — not critical

known_bloatware.name: Microsoft Office
known_bloatware.reason: Background processes stay active even when no Office app is open

known_bloatware.name: Dropbox
known_bloatware.reason: Can use a lot of CPU during sync

known_bloatware.name: Google Drive
known_bloatware.reason: Uses CPU during sync — usually fine

known_bloatware.name: OneDrive
known_bloatware.reason: Updater occasionally hangs

known_bloatware.name: Folding@home
known_bloatware.reason: Distributed-computing project — burns CPU intentionally but slows the Mac

known_bloatware.name: WiFi Signal
known_bloatware.reason: Simple app that occasionally uses more resources than its function warrants

known_bloatware.name: MacKeeper
known_bloatware.reason: Notoriously aggressive and hard to remove — classified as PUP (Potentially Unwanted Program)

known_bloatware.name: Parallels Desktop
known_bloatware.reason: Leaves many processes active even when no VM is running

known_bloatware.name: VMware Fusion
known_bloatware.reason: Network services stay active even when no VM is running

known_bloatware.name: Docker Desktop
known_bloatware.reason: Uses a lot of RAM for the Linux VM — normal but heavy

known_bloatware.name: Razer Synapse
known_bloatware.reason: Gaming software that often uses more resources than necessary

known_bloatware.name: SteelSeries GG
known_bloatware.reason: Gaming-peripheral software — multiple background processes

known_bloatware.name: Corsair iCUE
known_bloatware.reason: RGB control software that runs continuously in the background
